message:
feat(io): add ReaderStream and StreamReader bridge adapters

Implement bidirectional AsyncRead/Stream conversion adapters that bridge
the gap between byte-oriented and chunk-oriented async I/O:

- ReaderStream: wraps an AsyncRead and yields fixed-size Vec<u8> chunks as
  a Stream, enabling integration with stream-based processing pipelines
- StreamReader: wraps a Stream<Item=io::Result<Vec<u8>>> and implements
  AsyncRead, with careful buffering across chunks, deferred error delivery
  when partial data has been copied, and correct Pending state handling

Both adapters are exported from the io module as public API. Includes tests
for chunked reading, cross-chunk boundary reads, deferred error semantics,
and pending-then-data delivery scenarios.

Closes I/O parity gaps IO-G11 (ReaderStream) and IO-G12 partial
(StreamReader) in the tokio replacement audit — only SinkWriter remains.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
